name: George Dimov CPA
description_short: NYC-based CPA firm offering tax preparation, accounting, bookkeeping, and financial advisory services for individuals and businesses across New York.
description_long:
George Dimov, CPA operates as NYC Accounting Consulting (also branded as Dimov Partners CPAs), a full-service accounting and tax firm headquartered in New York City. The firm serves both individual taxpayers and business clients throughout the NYC metropolitan area, with particular expertise in navigating the complex federal, state, and local tax environment specific to New York.

The firm provides comprehensive tax services including corporate tax preparation, partnership and S-Corp/LLC taxation, personal income tax returns, estate and trust planning, and international taxation services. Beyond tax work, they offer extensive bookkeeping and accounting support—daily transaction recording, accounts payable/receivable management, bank reconciliation, and full financial statement preparation (balance sheets, income statements, cash flow statements). They also handle payroll processing, payroll tax compliance, and specialized services including cryptocurrency accounting and audit and assurance work.

Dimov CPA positions itself as a strategic advisory partner rather than a transactional tax preparer. They emphasize proactive tax planning to minimize liabilities, forward-thinking financial strategies tailored to New York's market, and a focus on compliance with federal, state, and city regulations. The website highlights their experience serving Fortune 500 professionals and specialization in technology and finance industry clients, suggesting a higher-end service model.

The primary limitation is that this is a professional services firm focused on accounting and tax preparation—not a consumer finance lender or credit-related service. While they may assist with financial strategy and bookkeeping, they do not provide loans, credit repair, debt relief, or direct consumer financing products. They function as advisors and service providers to help manage existing finances, not as a source of capital or credit solutions.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Comprehensive service range covering tax, accounting, bookkeeping, payroll, and audit services under one firm
Specializes in New York-specific federal, state, and local tax compliance and strategy
Offers advanced services like cryptocurrency accounting and international taxation for complex situations
Targets high-net-worth individuals and Fortune 500 professionals, indicating sophisticated tax planning expertise
Provides financial statement preparation and internal audit services for business decision-making
Claims commitment to sustainability practices in the NYC area
Accessible via phone (646-906-9046) and email with appointment booking available
cons: Not a consumer finance provider—cannot offer loans, credit products, or emergency funding
Website content is heavy on marketing language; specific case studies, client testimonials, or verifiable credentials are absent
No transparent pricing information provided on website; requires direct contact for quote
Appears to focus on higher-end clients (Fortune 500, high-net-worth) rather than small businesses or budget-conscious individuals
No information on response times, turnaround timelines for tax returns, or service level agreements
best_for: New York-based business owners and self-employed professionals needing comprehensive tax and accounting support
High-net-worth individuals seeking strategic tax planning and estate/trust services
Technology and finance industry professionals with complex or international tax situations
Businesses requiring audit, internal controls evaluation, and regulatory compliance services
diagnosis: George Dimov, CPA is a professional accounting and tax advisory firm, not a consumer finance company. It is best suited for New York-based business owners, high-net-worth individuals, and self-employed professionals who need tax preparation, bookkeeping, financial planning, and compliance support. The critical caveat is that this firm does not provide loans, credit repair, debt relief, or any direct consumer financing products—it is strictly a service provider for accounting and tax management.
services: Corporate tax preparation and filing (federal, state, and local)
Personal income tax preparation and filing
Tax planning and strategy to minimize tax liabilities
Payroll processing and payroll tax compliance
Financial statement preparation (balance sheets, income statements, cash flow statements)
International taxation and transfer pricing services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 211 E 43rd St Suite 7-100, New York, NY 10017
